programme.title: Below Deck
programme.desc: Kyle and Solene's relationship takes an unexpected turn, complicating the dynamic within the deck team. Barbara and Solene grow weary of their second stew. Fraser scrambles to put together an ambitiou.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of London
programme.desc: Tensions erupt at Nessie's red-themed dinner as Karen and Panthea clash. A day of alpacas and countryside calm is followed by an emotional dinner, but a cryptic Instagram post soon leaves the group qu.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: When a woman covered in blood shows up on her neighbor's doorstep, Georgia police commence a home invasion investigation that leads them to uncover more twists than they could have ever imagined.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: With rumours swirling about her divorce, Erika reveals new details about why she left her husband; a group outing on the town goes up in flames when Kathy unintentionally reignites a dying spark.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Plaintiff claims she is being overcharged and taken advantage of by an crooked landlord while searching for a home for her disabled daughter. However, the landlord contends that the plaintiff was a hi.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing LA
programme.desc: David and James throw a massive party as a last ditch effort to sell their St. Ives listing, but find that agents are just looking to take advantage of their client's financial situation.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: The Sharks give budding entrepreneurs the chance to secure business deals that could make them millionaires.

programme.desc: With rumours swirling about her divorce, Erika reveals new details about why she left her husband; a group outing on the town goes up in flames when Kathy unintentionally reignites a dying spark.

programme.desc: With some of his crew furious about the distribution of tip money, Captain Lee has to make a decision about how to handle Andrew. Kate is excited about a new charter guest who has very specific and re.

programme.desc: When a woman covered in blood shows up on her neighbor's doorstep, Georgia police commence a home invasion investigation that leads them to uncover more twists than they could have ever imagined.

programme.desc: With rumours swirling about her divorce, Erika reveals new details about why she left her husband; a group outing on the town goes up in flames when Kathy unintentionally reignites a dying spark.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A daughter refuses to pay her mother back on a cash loan or return an I-phone she's paying for. But the defendant claims she doesn't owe her mother one red penny!

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Guests include Stanley Tucci, Brenda Song, Diljit Dosanjh and musical guest Diljit Dosanjh.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.sub-title: The Good, the Bad and the Ugly Leath
programme.desc: Harry Hamlin's homemade bolognese sauce spices up Lisa's gathering, but Crystal's non-apology pushes Sutton to her boiling point.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing LA
programme.desc: Josh Altman battles his own client over a $20 million dollar listing price for a sexy Sunset Strip bachelor pad. Josh Flagg makes a big decision that his friends and family find shocking.

programme.title: Next Gen NYC
programme.desc: Ariana leaves Atlanta behind for a fresh NYC start, but she and boyfriend Hudson need to find an apartment first. Brooks juggles a fashion shoot alongside her mom, Meredith, while quietly side-eyeing.

programme.title: Summer House
programme.desc: With Lindsay out of the house for the weekend, Carl invites a girl to the party. Jesse feels the pressures of monogamy. Kyle sits down with Craig to hash out their issues.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A tumultuous household dynamic results in the deaths of four family members... but who pulled the trigger?

The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: Sutton and Crystal continue stirring the sauce at Lisa's Bolognese lunch, as they lay all their lingering issues out on the table.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing LA
programme.desc: Madison goes up against David and James for a modern Malibu compound, but when the owner toys with the idea of teaming them all up.

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: The Sharks give budding entrepreneurs the chance to secure business deals that could make them millionaires.

programme.title: Below Deck
programme.sub-title: Strains, Stains, and a Big Pain
programme.desc: A night of fun turns sour when Kelley confronts some fellow yachties who insult Amy and Jennice. Ben and Kate struggle to accommodate a returning charter guest and her rambunctious family.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A former ballerina fatally shoots her estranged husband in what she claims to be an act of self-defense. The case receives major media coverage after a history of questionable allegations and conflict.

programme.title: Dateline International
programme.desc: Motivational speaker Rebecca Musser talks about her life in The Fundamentalist Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints and what made her leave the denomination.

programme.title: Dateline International
programme.desc: Motivational speaker Rebecca Musser talks about her life in The Fundamentalist Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints and what made her leave the denomination.
